degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected focused lifecycle bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents.
implementation_summary: Added public CancellationEvent and ErrorEvent structs plus Observer.Cancellation and Observer.Error lifecycle helpers.
Cancellation events export non-retryable canceled observations with shared error classification, cancellation reason, correlation, metadata redaction, and normalized error attributes.
Generic error events export failed observations with shared observation error normalization, including existing ObservationError preservation, retryable, dropped, correlation, and metadata behavior.
validation: reviewer lifecycle-error-schema-review git diff --check main...HEAD: pass
review_suggestion_summary: Consider adding direct plain-error ErrorEvent coverage and default nil-input field assertions.
Consider downstream conversion/export coverage for ErrorEvent and documentation that CancellationEvent is non-retryable by design.
Consider consolidating terminal lifecycle error construction if more lifecycle helpers are added.
